example_sentence_en: The Spring Festival is the most important festival in China.

example_sentence_en: Scientists are trying to understand how the universe began.

example_sentence_en: The astronaut walked in space for the first time.
example_sentence_cn: 这位宇航员第一次在太空中行走。

example_sentence_en: The crew completed their mission on the space station.

example_sentence_cn: 这位艺术家在他的画作中使用了鲜艳的色彩。

example_sentence_en: The design of the vase is very elegant.
example_sentence_cn: 这个花瓶的设计非常优雅。
inflection: 比较级: more elegant | 最高级: most elegant

example_sentence_en: The delicate porcelain was handled with great care.
example_sentence_cn: 这件精致的瓷器被小心翼翼地拿放。
inflection: 比较级: more delicate | 最高级: most delicate

example_sentence_en: The artwork left a profound impression on me.
example_sentence_cn: 这件艺术品给我留下了深刻的印象。
inflection: 比较级: more profound | 最高级: most profound

example_sentence_en: We learned a lot about history at the museum.
example_sentence_cn: 我们在博物馆学到了很多关于历史的知识。

example_sentence_en: The local people are skilled in traditional crafts.
example_sentence_cn: 当地人擅长传统手工艺。

example_sentence_en: The museum has a fine collection of ceramic vases.
example_sentence_cn: 博物馆收藏了精美的陶瓷花瓶。

example_sentence_en: She is a student of fine arts.
example_sentence_cn: 她是一名美术专业的学生。
inflection: 比较级: finer | 最高级: finest
